services.name: pub.replicator:addReleaseRegistryEntry
services.description: WmPublic. Adds an entry to the webMethods Integration Server's Package Release Registry.

input_parameters.name: package
input_parameters.description: String Name of the package. The service confirms that this package exists on the server before adding an entry to the Package Release Registry.

input_parameters.name: name
input_parameters.description: String Name of the release. This name could be different from the name of the package.

input_parameters.name: version
input_parameters.description: String Version number of the release, in the format #.# or #.#.# (for example, 1.2 or 1.2.1).

input_parameters.name: build
input_parameters.description: String Build number of the release (for example, 12, 530).

input_parameters.name: patchNums
input_parameters.description: String One or more comma-separated patch numbers included in this release.

input_parameters.name: JVMVersion
input_parameters.description: String Minimum JVM version number that this release requires.

input_parameters.name: description
input_parameters.description: String Brief description of this release. You may want to use this parameter to summarize the nature and purpose of the release.

output_parameters.name: packages
output_parameters.description: Document List Entries in the server's Package Release Registry.

output_parameters.name: name
output_parameters.description: String Name of the release.

output_parameters.name: version
output_parameters.description: String Version number of the release, in the format #.# or #.#.# (for example, 1.2 or 1.2.1).

output_parameters.name: build
output_parameters.description: String Conditional. Build number of the release (for example, 12, 530).

output_parameters.name: patch_nums
output_parameters.description: String Conditional. Comma-separated list of patch numbers included in this release.

output_parameters.name: time
output_parameters.description: String Time when the package was released.

output_parameters.name: jvm_version
output_parameters.description: String Minimum JVM version number that the release requires.

output_parameters.name: description
output_parameters.description: String Conditional. Brief description of this release.

output_parameters.name: source_server_version
output_parameters.description: String Version number of Integration Server that released the package.

usage_notes: Before using this service, use pub.replicator:packageCreation to create a package zip file in the server's outbound directory. When you use addReleaseRegistryEntry to add an entry to the Package Release Registry, the package name you specify in package should match the package name you specified in pub.replicator:packageCreation.

services.name: pub.replicator:deleteReleaseRegistryEntry
services.description: WmPublic. Deletes an entry from the webMethods Integration Server's Package Release Registry.

input_parameters.name: packageName
input_parameters.description: String Name of the release that you want to delete.

output_parameters.name: packages
output_parameters.description: Document List Entries that remain in the server's Package Release Registry.

output_parameters.name: name
output_parameters.description: String Name of the release.

output_parameters.name: version
output_parameters.description: String Version number of the release, in the format #.# or #.#.# (for example, 1.2 or 1.2.1).

output_parameters.name: build
output_parameters.description: String Conditional. Build number of the release (for example, 12, 530).

output_parameters.name: patch_nums
output_parameters.description: String Conditional. Comma-separated list of patch numbers included in this release.

output_parameters.name: time
output_parameters.description: String Time when the package was released.

output_parameters.name: jvm_version
output_parameters.description: String Minimum JVM version number that the release requires.

output_parameters.name: description
output_parameters.description: String Conditional. Brief description of the release.

output_parameters.name: source_server_version
output_parameters.description: String Version number of Integration Server that released the package.

services.name: pub.replicator:distributeViaFTP
services.description: WmPublic. Allows a publisher to send a package to a subscriber via FTP or allows a subscriber to retrieve a package from a publisher via FTP.

input_parameters.name: packageName
input_parameters.description: String Name of the released package.

input_parameters.name: action
input_parameters.description: String Flag that specifies whether you want to send (put) a package to another Integration Server or whether you want to retrieve (get) a package from another Integration Server. Set to: get to retrieve a package from the publisher's server. This is the default. put to send a package to a subscriber's server.

input_parameters.name: serverhost
input_parameters.description: String Host name or IP address of the remote Integration Server.

input_parameters.name: serverport
input_parameters.description: String Number of the FTP port on the remote Integration Server.

input_parameters.name: username
input_parameters.description: String User name that your server will use to log on to the remote Integration Server.

input_parameters.name: password
input_parameters.description: String Password that your server will use to log on to the remote Integration Server.

services.name: pub.replicator:distributeViaSvcPull
services.description: WmPublic. Pulls a specified package release from a publisher's server.

input_parameters.name: packageName
input_parameters.description: String Name of the release.

input_parameters.name: publisher
input_parameters.description: String Alias of the publisher's server.

services.name: pub.replicator:distributeViaSvcPush
services.description: WmPublic. Pushes a package from your server to a list of subscribers (other webMethods Integration Servers).

input_parameters.name: packageName
input_parameters.description: String The name of the release.

input_parameters.name: subscriber
input_parameters.description: String List List of the subscriber's host names or IP addresses.

input_parameters.name: packageName
input_parameters.description: String Name of the package.

input_parameters.name: action
input_parameters.description: String User-defined string that describes the replication event, such as “pulled” or “pushed.”

services.name: pub.replicator:getLocalReleasedList
services.description: WmPublic. Returns all entries in your webMethods Integration Server's Package Release Registry.

output_parameters.name: packages
output_parameters.description: Document List Entries in the server's Package Release Registry.

output_parameters.name: name
output_parameters.description: String Name of the release.

output_parameters.name: version
output_parameters.description: String Version number of the release, in the format #.# or #.#.# (for example, 1.2 or 1.2.1).

output_parameters.name: build
output_parameters.description: String Conditional. Build number of the release (for example, 12, 530).

output_parameters.name: patch_nums
output_parameters.description: String Conditional. Comma-separated list of the patch numbers included in this release.

output_parameters.name: time
output_parameters.description: String Time when the package was released.

output_parameters.name: jvm_version
output_parameters.description: String Minimum JVM version number that the release requires.

output_parameters.name: description
output_parameters.description: String Conditional. Brief description of the release.

output_parameters.name: source_server_version
output_parameters.description: String Version number of webMethods Integration Server that released the package.

services.name: pub.replicator:getRemoteReleasedList
services.description: WmPublic. Queries the publisher for released packages.

input_parameters.name: publisher
input_parameters.description: String Alias of the publishing server.

output_parameters.name: packages
output_parameters.description: Document List List of released packages on the publishing server to which you subscribe.

output_parameters.name: name
output_parameters.description: String Name of the release.

output_parameters.name: version
output_parameters.description: String Version number of the release, in the format #.# or #.#.# (for example, 1.2 or 1.2.1).

output_parameters.name: build
output_parameters.description: String Conditional. Build number of the release (for example, 12, 530).

output_parameters.name: patch_nums
output_parameters.description: String Conditional. Comma-separated list of the patch numbers included in this release.

output_parameters.name: time
output_parameters.description: String Time when the package was released.

output_parameters.name: jvm_version
output_parameters.description: String Minimum JVM version number that the release requires.

output_parameters.name: description
output_parameters.description: String Conditional. Brief description of the release.

output_parameters.name: source_server_version
output_parameters.description: String Version number of webMethods Integration Server that released the package.

services.name: pub.replicator:notifyPackageRelease
services.description: WmPublic. Sends an e-mail message to subscribers who have said that they want to be notified when a new release becomes available.

input_parameters.name: packageName
input_parameters.description: String Name of the release.

services.name: pub.replicator:packageCreation
services.description: WmPublic. Creates a distribution file (a zip file) for the package.

input_parameters.name: package
input_parameters.description: String Name of the package.

input_parameters.name: name
input_parameters.description: String Name of the release.

input_parameters.name: version
input_parameters.description: String Version number of the release, in the format #.# or #.#.# (for example, 1.2 or 1.2.1).

input_parameters.name: build
input_parameters.description: String Build number of the release (for example, 12, 530).

input_parameters.name: patchNums
input_parameters.description: String Comma-separated list of patch numbers included in the release.

input_parameters.name: targetPkgVersion
input_parameters.description: String Version number of the target package. To prevent the installation program from overwriting an existing (higher) version of the package, this field is checked when the subscriber installs this package over an existing package.

input_parameters.name: targetServerVersion
input_parameters.description: String Version number of the webMethods Integration Server that this release requires.

input_parameters.name: JVMVersion
input_parameters.description: String Minimum JVM version number that this release requires.

input_parameters.name: description
input_parameters.description: String Brief description of this release. You might use this parameter to summarize the nature and purpose of the release.

input_parameters.name: type
input_parameters.description: String Flag indicating the type of release. Set to: full to indicate a full package. This is the default. partial to indicate a patch or an update for the package.

input_parameters.name: filter
input_parameters.description: String Flag that specifies whether all files are to be included in the distribution file or only selected files. If only selected files are to be included, use this parameter in conjunction with fileList to specify which files to include. Set to: includeall to include all the files in the distribution file. This is the default. include to include selected files in the distribution file. exclude to include all except selected files in the distribution file.

input_parameters.name: fileList
input_parameters.description: String List Names of files to include or exclude from the distribution file, depending on the value of filter.

input_parameters.name: fileNamePattern
input_parameters.description: String Pattern string that specifies the names of files to be included in the distribution file. The asterisk (*) is the only wildcard character allowed in a pattern string. All other characters are treated literally (for example, *.java, *.dsp).

input_parameters.name: filesToDeleteList
input_parameters.description: String List Optional. The names of files that will be deleted from the target package when the subscribing server installs the package created by this service.

output_parameters.name: $result
output_parameters.description: String Conditional. If the distribution file is created successfully, this parameter contains the value OK. If the distribution file was not created successfully, this parameter is not present in the output signature and the service throws an exception.

usage_notes: After you use packageCreation to create the package, use pub.replicator:addReleaseRegistryEntry to add an entry to the Package Release Registry. The package name you specify in packageCreation should match the package name you specify in pub.replicator:addReleaseRegistryEntry.
